title: Ballpit Test
body:
The ultimate test - A single simulated biped in a pool of plastic spheres.

If we can perfectly simulate a one on one interaction with an entity in a container of colliding spheres then we may be able to crack the code on truly perfecting an experience.

Or maybe everyone finds enough fun in chugging a bunch of ultra-mersion and run around the city like lunatics?

- Office of Simulated Research
